_comment: NEPTUNE — Gaviota Port (gym 5, Water) leader intro. A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), reusing Cicada's takehara_leader_intro geometry VERBATIM: the SAME relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 chaining so gym/engage_gaviota_leader still opens the battle from the endBack stage. Structure mirrors Cicada: pull up over the challenger's shoulder, a TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to Neptune's face (the two z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close holds mirror the push-in), cross high for a side profile, then drop home. startTitle names him; a WATER-type effect cue (splash + bubble particles anchored ON the leader via `execute at <uuid>`) plus dolphin/underwater sounds sell the Tidemaster reveal. Particles anchor on Neptune's uuid so they land ON him (fixes Cicada's rough challenger-offset placement). IN-WORLD TUNING NEEDED: air-verify + nudge the zoom-keyframe framing and the ~ ~1 ~ particle height at the real Gaviota arena. endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at 0517452a-51a8-4a51-91e1-364a0c6765b6 run particle minecraft:splash ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at 0517452a-51a8-4a51-91e1-364a0c6765b6 run particle minecraft:bubble ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
